case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MANUEL DE JESUS MEJIA PONCE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUL-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PONCE, MANUEL DE JESUS MEJIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REPRESENTATIVE ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PONCE, MANUEL DE JESUS MEJIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL DE JESUS MEJIA PONCE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PONCE, MANUEL DE JESUS MEJIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
